visual-builder.workbench-history-action.doc:
项目变更历史

## Examples

### Basic

```yaml preview
brick: visual-builder.workbench-history-action
properties:
  appId: project-a
# -- YAML DELIMITER (1nbbm8) --
# <visual-builder.workbench-history-action
#   app-id="project-a"
# ></visual-builder.workbench-history-action>
# 
```

visual-builder.page-arch-node.doc:
构件 `visual-builder.page-arch-node`

## Examples

### Basic

```yaml preview
brick: visual-builder.page-arch-node
properties:
  label: 名称
  type: page
# -- YAML DELIMITER (1nbbm8) --
# <visual-builder.page-arch-node
#   label="名称"
#   type="page"
# ></visual-builder.page-arch-node>
# 
```

### With SubNodes

```yaml preview
brick: visual-builder.page-arch-node
properties:
  label: 列表
  type: page
  subNodes:
    - label: 详情
      id: detail
# -- YAML DELIMITER (1nbbm8) --
# <visual-builder.page-arch-node
#   label="列表"
#   type="page"
#   id="brick-1"
# ></visual-builder.page-arch-node>
# 
# <script>
#   const brick_1 = document.getElementById("brick-1");
#   brick_1.subNodes = [
#     {
#       label: "详情",
#       id: "detail",
#     },
#   ];
# </script>
# 
```
